titleStmt.title: SII 41.63: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 63. (A.R. No. 62 of 1905.) Madurai, Madurai Taluk, Madurai District. On a pillar in the second story of the east gōpura of the Sundaraēśvara temple at Madura.

p.hi: Pāṇḍya. J. Kulaśēkhara, Year 2. Tulā month, Apara 6, Thursday, Mrigaśīrsham = 1238, September 30.

summary.p: Records that the king remitted taxes on some land that his senior officer Ayyan Maḻavarāyar gave to a maṭha called Tiruñāṉasambandaṉ at Madurai in Māḍakkuḷakkīḻ which was under the management of Taṟpurshaśivar a disciple of the Āchāriyar of Dakshiṇagōḷaki-maḍam of Chelva-Tiruvārūr. The land was lying in Chōḷāntaka-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Pāgaṉūr-kūṟṟam. The sabhā of this village also agreed to exempt the land from the payment of their dues, sabhā-vinoyōgam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kocca
ṭaiyapaṉmarāṉa ti
ripuvaṉac cakkaravatti
kaḷ śrīkulacekara
tevaṟki yāṇṭu 2
vatu tulā nāyaṟ
ṟu Aparapakṣattu ṣa
ṣṭhiyum viyāḻakki
maiyum peṟṟa mra
gaśīriṣattu nāḷ
pākanūṟ kūṟṟa
ttu brahmade
ya śrīcoḷā
ntakac caturvvedimaṅ
kalattu virapāṇṭi
yaṉ maṇṭapattile ma
hājanamum bhaṭṭarkaḷu
m nirvvāhakarum kūṭṭak
kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyirukka
Uṭaiyār maḻavarāyar
suvāmikaḷ celvatti
ruvāruṟ dakṣiṇa koḷa
kimaṭattu Ācāriyar śiṣya
ril taṟpuruṣaśivaṟku ni
yokaṅ kuṭutta paricā
vatu Ivvācāriyar māṭa
k kuḷakkiḻ maturait ti
ruñāṉacampantaṉ tiruma
ṭattukku Ivvūrk kaṭamai
yiṟukkuṅ kōlāl I
ṟaiyili Iṭṭa nilam vē
likku Ivvāṇṭu mutal
taṭik kuṟuṇiyum Eppe
yaṟpaṭṭa sabhāviṉiyō
kamun tavira vēṇume
ṉṟu taṟpuruṣa śivar Ape
[kṣi]ttup paḷḷippi
ṭam maḻavarāyaṉi
l Eḻuntaruḷiyiru
ntu maḻavarāyar
svāmikaḷ celva
ttiruvārur da[kṣiṇa]
koḷakimaṭattu
Ācāriya siṣyaril
taṟpuruṣa śivar ce
yyat tiruvāy
moḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi
Ivvācāriyar mā
ṭakkuḷakkiḻ matu
rait tiruñāṉacam
pantaṉ maṭattukku
p pākaṉūrk kūṟṟa
ttuc coḻakulān
takaccaturvvedimaṅka
lattu śrīvallavaṉ ka
ṭṭaḷaiyilum parākra
ma pāṇṭiyaṉ kaṭṭa
ḷaiyilun tamperā
l Aiyaṉ maḻavarāya
r vilaikoṇṭu kuṭu
tta nilamum parākrama
pāṇṭiyaṉ kaṭṭaḷai
k kīḻk kūṟṟil Ejñamūr
ttiyāṇṭār paṟṟāy
Aiyaṉ maḻavarāyarkku
k kāṇiyā yivar kuṭutta
nilamum Uṭpaṭa Ivvū
r kaṭamaiyiṟukkuṅ
kolāl veli nila
m Iraṇṭāvatu muta
l kārāṇmai mīyā
ṭciyum Antarāya
mum viṉiyoka
mu mākkalamun ta
ṭip patakkum pāṭi
kāvalun taruvatā
ṉa Accum kāriya
vārācciyum ve
ṭṭi pāṭṭamum pa
ñcupili cantuvikki
rakappeṟum maṟ
ṟum Epperppaṭ
ṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa ma
ṭappuṟa Iṟaiyili
yāka viṭappeṟa
veṇumeṉṟu Ai
yaṉ maḻavarāyar nama
kku coṉṉamaiyi
livar svāmikaḷ
celvattiruvārur da
kṣṇakoḷakimaṭat
tu Ācāriyar maṭamā
ṉa māṭakkuḷakkiḻ ma
turait tiruñāṉacam
pantaṉ maṭattukku
p pākaṉūrk kūṟṟata
tuc coḻakulāntaka
c caturvvedimaṅkalat
tu śrīvallavaṉ kaṭṭa
ḷaiyilum parākrama pā
ṇṭiyaṉ kaṭṭaḷai
yilun tampērāl Ai
yaṉ maḻavarāyar vi
laikoṇṭu kuṭutta
nilamum parākrama pā
ṇṭiyaṉ kaṭṭaḷai
k kīḻk kūṟṟil Ejña
mūrttiyāṇṭār
paṟṟāy Aiyaṉ ma
ḻavarāyarkkuk kā
ṇiyāy Ivarkku
k kuṭutta nilamum
Uṭpaṭa Ivvūr
kaṭamai Iṟukku
ṅ kolāl nila
m veliyum Iv
vāṇṭumutal kā
rāṇmai miyāṭ
ciyum Antarāyamum
viṉiyokamu mā
kkalamun taṭippatak
kum pāṭikāvalun
taruvatāṉa Accum
kāriyavārācciyu
m veṭṭipāṭṭa
mum pañcupīli cantu
vikkirakap pēṟum
maṟṟum Eppērp
paṭṭaṉavum Uṭpa
ṭa maṭappuṟa Iṟai
yiliyāka Iṭṭu vari
yilār Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷ
variyum nam Ōlaiyun ta
raccoṉṉom kaik
koṇṭu Ippaṭi can
tirātyavaṟ celvatā
kak kalliluñ cem
pilum veṭṭivit
tuk koḷkaveṉ
ṟu tiruvāymoḻi
ntaruḷiṉār Ivai tiru
malli nāṭṭut taṭaṅka
ṇṇic ciṟṟūruṭaiyāṉ
coṟaṉ Uyya niṉṟāṭu
vāṉāṉa kurukulattarayaṉ
Eḻuttu Ivai miḻalai
ṟāviṉiyōka mep
peṟpaṭṭaṉavun tavi
rntamaikku niyōka
ṅ koṭuttom co
ḷāntaka caturvvedi
maṅkalattu mahāsa
bhaiyom § Ippa
ṭikkivai nārāyaṇaṉ
cūriyatevapaṭṭaṉ po
ṟkoyinampi Eḻut
tu Ippaṭikkivai śrī
vāsudevaṉ cūriya
teva paṭṭaṉ po
ṟkoyil nampi
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikki
vai ceṭṭapocaṉ ca
krapāṇi paṭṭaṉāṉa Utta
ma nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭi
kkivai Aṉpiṟ somayā
ji cirāmapaṭṭaṉāṉa tiru
varaṅkappiccaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikkivai cāttaṉ
jātaveta bhaṭṭaṉāṉa śrī
māheśvaranampi Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikkivai so
mayāji vaṭukajāta[ vēda] bha
ṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi
kkivai [ śiṟā] paḷḷi
ssarvvakratu jātaveta
bhaṭṭasomayāji E
ḻuttu Ippaṭikki
vai teṟkunokki niṉṟā
ṉ tirumāliruñcolainā
rāyaṇa bhaṭṭaṉ E
ḻuttu
Ippaṭikkivai tuṟumu
ṇṭic colaippirāṉ
bhaṭṭasomayāji Eḻu
ttu Ippaṭikkivai
komapuṟattu veṇṇai
paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippa
ṭikkivai tiṭṭai nārā
yaṇa bhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikkivai pacalaiu
taiyativākaraṉ tirumāli
ruñcolai nārāyaṇa paṭ
ṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikki
vai
Digital edition of SII 41.63 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
